channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: ECB’s Müller: The longer the war lasts, the more likely that we will have to respond
item.description: European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council member Madis Müller said in an interview with Econostream that the central bank might need to wait for the release of second-round inflation effects before making any monetary policy adjustment. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: investingLive European session wrap: Risk retreats as Trump extension sees limited relief
item.description: Headlines: Oil prices extend into new highs amid weekend risk hedging as Trump's jawboning fails The can being kicked down the road is not a good thing for markets IRGC warns that Strait of Hormuz remains "closed", prohibits any passage by US allies How have interest rate expectations changed after this week's events? ECB's Muller: Not sure we need... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: ECB: Limited hikes despite inflation spike – Commerzbank
item.description: Commerzbank’s Jörg Krämer expects the ECB to react to war‑driven energy inflation with at most one additional rate hike. Inflation is projected to rise above 3% by summer before easing, while Eurozone growth is revised down to 0.6% in 2026. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Oil prices extend into new highs amid weekend risk hedging as Trump's jawboning fails
item.description: Oil prices are again rising into triple digit levels due to the lack of any breakthrough in the US-Iran “negotiations” and the increasing risk of an escalation over the weekend. Trump has been jawboning prices throughout the entire week with ceasefire comments and claims that Iran has been “begging” him for a deal. Meanwhile, the US military buildu... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: ECB's Muller: Not sure we need to wait for fully visible second round effects to act
item.description: ECB might not need to wait for fully visible second round effects before increasing rates Once energy prices have remained elevated for several weeks, one can already be reasonably confident that second round effects are likely I would not be surprised if by the next policy meeting, elevated energy prices were already showing up more broadly in the... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Nasdaq breaks into new monthly lows as traders hedge into the weekend risk
item.description: FUNDAMENTAL OVERVIEW The Nasdaq has been slowly erasing Monday’s gains as traders have been getting increasingly worried of an escalation over the weekend. Trump has been jawboning the markets throughout the entire week with ceasefire comments and claims that Iran has been “begging” him for a deal. Meanwhile, the US military buildup in the Middle E... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Former BoJ Kuroda: Central bank should not pause approaching policy normalization
item.description: Former Bank of Japan (BoJ) Governor Haruhiko Kuroda said in an interview with the Asahi newspaper that the central bank should continue pushing the monetary policy towards normalization. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: How have interest rate expectations changed after this week's events?
item.description: Rate hikes by year-end ECB: 85 bps (71% probability of rate hike at the next meeting) BoE: 81 bps (84% probability of rate hike at the next meeting) BoC: 76 bps (77% probability of no change at the next meeting) RBA: 75 bps (72% probability of rate hike at the next meeting) RBNZ: 75 bps (88% probability of no change at the next meeting) BoJ: 54 bps... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Markets Today: Risk-Off sentiment supports the Dollar as US consumer sentiment data lies ahead
item.description: Global markets react to Middle East tensions, supporting a strong US Dollar amidst 'higher-for-longer' energy price expectations and potential US rate hikes. European and Asian indices are mixed, though oil prices cooled slightly. UK retail sales fell less than expected. Investors are focused on US consumer sentiment data, specifically inflation ex... Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: BOJ would hike rates in April "if you think about it normally", says former governor
item.description: Long time no see, Mr. Kuroda. He spokes to the Asahi newspaper in an interview and shared some of his thoughts on BOJ policy setting at the moment. The BOJ would raise the policy rate in April if you think about it normally The US-Iran war would only serve to accelerate interest rate hikes It should not place a pause on the process of monetary poli... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: EUR/USD: War-driven forecasts and softer Dollar outlook – Commerzbank
item.description: Commerzbank, led by Chief Economist Jörg Krämer, has cut its 2026 Eurozone growth forecast and now expects fewer ECB rate hikes than futures imply, while still projecting more Fed cuts than markets. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: US futures pare gains to fall flat on the day now
item.description: S P 500 futures were up by around 0.7% earlier in the day on hopes of "peace" as US president Trump extended the cooling period on strikes against Iranian energy facilities for another 10 days. That as he touts "very substantial talks" happening in the background. All that being said, this is all mere noise. As mentioned, nothing changes for market... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: ECB: Energy shock keeps hikes in play – Nordea
item.description: Nordea’s Jan von Gerich argues that higher energy prices from the Middle East conflict have sharply increased uncertainty around the ECB’s rate path, with April hikes now being priced but still seen as premature without clearer inflation spillovers. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Gold trims a part of intraday gains amid bullish USD, hawkish central banks
item.description: Gold (XAU/USD) sticks to a positive bias through the first half of the European session on Friday, though it lacks follow-through amid the emergence of fresh US Dollar (USD) buying. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Gold prices remain under pressure amid risk of a ground invasion over the weekend
item.description: FUNDAMENTAL OVERVIEW Gold is slowly erasing the gains as traders are getting increasingly worried of the risk of an escalation over the weekend. Trump has been jawboning the markets throughout the entire week with ceasefire comments and claims that Iran has been “begging” him for a deal. Meanwhile, the US military buildup in the Middle East increas... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: ECB’s Patsalides: I would not rush into any decision due to lack of information
item.description: European Central Bank (ECB) policymaker and Governor of the Central Bank of Cyprus Christodoulos Patsalides said in an interview during European trading hours on Friday that there is no need to rush for any monetary policy adjustments until the central bank has sufficient information. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB policymaker Patsalides says no rush to raise interest rates
item.description: I would not rush into any decision, prefer to be more cautious Still need to assess whether this ​should be looked through or whether we should be making a rate decision We don't have sufficient information to make a decision for now I think we are still along the baseline We haven’t seen anything that points to a change in ​either the duration or ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Spain March preliminary CPI +3.3% vs +3.7% y/y expected
item.description: Prior +2.3% HICP +3.3% vs +3.9% y/y expected Prior +2.5% This is the first indication that higher energy prices are starting to see an impact. The monthly inflation estimate shows a 1.0% increase, which is the highest since February 2023. That is leading to headline annual inflation in Spain rising to 3.3%, which is the highest since June 2024. Tha... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: BOJ re-estimates Japan's estimated natural rate of interest after review
item.description: Using latest data, the estimate of the natural rate of interest is around -0.9% to +0.5% That estimate is as of Q3 2025 BOJ latest estimation is based on six models, including time-series and structural models Although the range itself has not changed significantly, a closer look reveals that many of the estimates have recently been moderately on t... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Iran Strike Pause: Slow-Boil Inflation Nightmare Scenario Keeps Dollar on Top
item.description: The latest 10-day extension of the Iran strike pause by US President Donald Trump might act as a “relief valve”, preventing a freefall in stocks. But it has also created a “slow-boil” inflation trap that is forcing a dramatic global monetary policy reversal. Contrary to providing a sentiment boost, Trump’s extension is paralyzing equity... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: Stagflation Trap Could Tie RBA’s Hawkish Hand, and Send AUD/JPY to 103
item.description: AUD/JPY’s selloff is accelerating as renewed risk aversion combines with a growing “stagflation trap” that is undermining the Reserve Bank of Australia’s hawkish outlook. While markets still price around a 72% chance of a May rate hike, surging energy and fertilizer costs are increasingly seen as a drag on growth rather than a simple inflation [&#8... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: RBI to hold rates at 5.25% through 2027 as oil risks cloud outlook
item.description: RBI seen on hold through 2027 as oil risks skew inflation outlook higher Summary: Reuters poll: 69 of 71 economists expect RBI to hold at 5.25% on April 8 Majority see rates unchanged until at least mid-2027 Inflation below 4% target gives RBI policy flexibility Middle East conflict raises oil-driven inflation risks RBI expected to maintain neutral... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Oil Not a Simple Boost as BoC Rogers Flags Inflation and Growth Risks
item.description: Oil is no longer a clean positive for Canada, as a Bank of Canada official warn that the latest energy shock also risks fueling broader inflation rather. Senior Deputy Governor Carolyn Rogers said in a speech it is “too early to assess the impacts of the war on growth”, but made clear that higher oil […] The post Oil Not a Simple ... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: Spectre of Middle East war hovers over residential development summit
item.description: There was no avoiding the economic impact of the Middle East war at a Property Council summit this week, but reform and infrastructure were on the agenda too. Fuente: NewsData NZD

item.title: ASX dips as markets mull conflicting peace talk reports
item.description: Australia's share market has slipped, tracking a Wall Street dip, as traders weighed US President Donald Trump's latest delay of a deadline on Iran and limited progress in unlocking the Strait of Hormuz. Fuente: NewsData AUD

item.title: Martin Lewis reveals how to save money on four big price hikes coming NEXT MONTH
item.description: Money Saving Expert Martin Lewis has explained how to beat four major price rises coming next month on mobile bills, council tax, broadband and water - including discounts 'many' are missing out on Fuente: NewsData GBP

item.title: BOC Rogers: Will have a tough job dealing with structural changes to the economy
item.description: Structural economic shifts (trade, immigration, AI) expected to permanently reshape Canada’s economy Bank of Canada faces a difficult task managing structural changes Economy likely to face significant upheaval over next five years with more variable inflation Reduced immigration will limit growth potential and pose economic challenges BoC assessin... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: USD/CHF Forecast: Critical Bullish Momentum Builds as Pair Challenges 200-Day SMA
item.description: BitcoinWorld USD/CHF Forecast: Critical Bullish Momentum Builds as Pair Challenges 200-Day SMA In global currency markets, the USD/CHF pair is demonstrating significant bullish momentum as it challenges the pivotal 200-day Simple Moving Average (SMA), a technical development that could signal a major trend shift for traders in 2025. This movement o... Fuente: NewsData CHF

item.title: USD/CHF Price Forecast: Bullish momentum builds as the pair challenges the 200-day SMA
item.description: USD/CHF extends gains on Thursday as broad-based US Dollar (USD) strength persists amid rising Middle East tensions, while the Swiss Franc (CHF) struggles to gain traction as traders remain cautious about potential intervention from the Swiss National Bank (SNB) to curb excessive currency appreciati Fuente: NewsData CHF

item.title: AUDUSD trades to the downside and tests a key target floor area between 0.6896 and 0.6910
item.description: The AUDUSD is typically a classic risk-on/risk-off barometer, but since the start of the Iran/US–Israel conflict on February 28, price action has been anything but one-directional. The pair has traded to new highs for the year, while also rotating back down to test late-January lows — a sign of heightened uncertainty and two-way volatility. Earlier... Fuente: InvestingLive
